# kuberay

> kuberay is a Kubernetes component. deploying 5 workload(s) (the-deployment, the-deployment, kuberay-operator, kuberay-operator, kuberay-operator) with 5 container(s). watching 8 resource type(s). exposing 4 service(s) on ports: 443, 8080, 8666. Dockerfile EXPOSE ports: 3000, 8080. with 3 webhook(s) (3 validating). connecting to external services: azure-blob, gcs, grpc. runtime dependencies: MinIO/S3, Redis, S3, ame, kuberay-apiserver-service, kubernetes. exposing 68 Prometheus metrics. Python k8s client with 30 API call(s) and 1 CRD kind reference(s). integrates with Prometheus, management relationship via labels/annotations. references components: vllm (import).
